name: Aural Exciter (audio chain v2)
author: KB2UKA
description: Aural-Exciter-style top-end harmonic enhancement — third of the Zeus voice audio chain blocks per issue #332. Biquad high-pass filter feeds a tanh waveshaper to synthesise upper harmonics, then mixes the harmonics back over the dry signal. v0.2.0 adds Input + Output gain trims and live vertical IN/OUT peak meters flanking the saturation-curve centerpiece. Realtime managed C#, no native dependency.
